// about the brand

Decoded
Culture

Cypher is more than a brand — it's a language spoken through fabric, form and the streets that shaped us. Born in Cape Town, built for those who see what others overlook.

Every piece carries a message. Every stitch is a signal. We don't follow trends — we decipher them.
